name: blog-post
description: Review policy for SEO blog posts. Validates word count and formatting, then runs AI review for tone, readability, and originality before human approval.

criteria.name: tone-alignment
criteria.description: Does the writing match the target tone?

criteria.name: readability
criteria.description: Is the content easy to read and well-structured?

criteria.name: originality
criteria.description: Is the content original and insightful?
